trait.name: Iron Chin
trait.text: While the brawler is wearing light or no armor and not using a shield, it uses its Constitution modifier in place of its Dexterity modifier to determine its AC.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The brawler makes two fisticuffs attacks or one fisticuffs attack and uses brace up.

action.name: Fisticuffs
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Brace Up
action.text: The brawler gains 7(1d6 + 4) temporary hit points.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The wrestler makes three fisticuffs attacks and a wrestling attack or two fisticuff attacks, brace up, and a wrestling attack.

action.name: Fisticuffs
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Wrestling
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: Creature is grappled or knocked prone, wrestler's choice.

action.name: Brace Up
action.text: The wrestler gains 10 (1d8 + 6) temporary hit points.

reaction.name: Quick Pin
reaction.text: When a creature provokes an opportunity attack from the wrestler, the wrestler can use its reaction to make two wrestling attacks against that creature.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The boxer makes four fisticuffs attacks or two fisticuff attacks and brace up.

action.name: Fisticuffs
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Brace Up
action.text: The boxer gains 14 (1d10 + 9) temporary hit points.

reaction.name: Cross Counter
reaction.text: When hit by a melee attack the boxer can use this reaction to reduce the damage taken by the attack by 14 (1d10 + 9). If this reduces the damage of the attack to 0 or lower, the boxer may make a fisticuffs attack against the creature who made the attack if they are within range.
